raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Remove contaminated clothing immediately.
STEP 2: Rinse skin with plenty of clean water for 15-20 minutes.
STEP 3: Wash skin thoroughly with soap and water.

DO NOT: Use harsh scrubbing brushes on the skin.

ESCALATE: Seek medical attention if irritation persists or if chemical entered eyes/mouth. Bring the product label/SDS.

immediate_steps: Rinse skin with plenty of clean water for 15-20 minutes.
Wash skin thoroughly with soap and water.
do_not_do: Use harsh scrubbing brushes on the skin.
escalate_when: Seek medical attention if irritation persists or if chemical entered eyes/mouth. Bring the product label/SDS.
